storage.notes: microSD slot supports up to 512GB per some retailer listings, though another listing states 128GB — confirm exact firmware-dependent limit before publishing.

features: WDR 120dB, BLC/HLC backlight compensation, DNR, defog
die-cast metal housing (Korean-standard build per one retailer's translated copy)
ONVIF, P2P, web and VMS support
release_notes: 8MP flagship of the Longse Value-series fixed bullet line.

frigate.notes: Not directly listed in the community RTSP database for this exact model, but shares the Longse Value-series platform with models that confirm the bare-root path. Not independently verified against a physical unit.

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF support confirmed generically by the retailer for this model.

blue_iris.notes: Not independently confirmed for this specific model.
